=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryTypeofType for this line" ===

skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with 'UsersRepo.User'" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryTypeofType_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryTypeofType:warning
import { Schema } from "effect"

export namespace UsersRepo {
  export const User = Schema.Struct({ id: Schema.Finite })
  export type User = typeof User.Type
}

export const preview: UsersRepo.User = { id: 1 }
